title: Durable Long-Running Work and Operations · Transfer Run
summary: Operate a multi-hour or multi-day agent task through interruptions. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a durable runbook and restartable workflow with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate durable orchestration state from ephemeral model turns.
Use scheduled checks or heartbeats only when timing or external state requires them.
Wait or subscribe for expected external changes without classifying unchanged state as failure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
